fields.name: P3_
fields.description: Writing to P3[5] writes the corresponding value to P35 pin according to the configuration mode defined by P3CFGA[5] and P3CFGB[5]. Reading from P3[5] reads the state of P35 pin.

fields.name: P3CFGB_5
fields.description: In conjuction with P3CFGA[5], it configures the functional mode of P35.

fields.name: P7CFGA_2
fields.description: Out of SPI mode, and in conjuction with P7CFGB[2], it configures the functional mode of the P72 pin.

fields.name: P7CFGA_1
fields.description: Out of SPI mode, and in conjuction with P7CFGB[1], it configures the functional mode of the P71 pin.

fields.name: P7CFGA_0
fields.description: In conjuction with P7CFGB[0], it configures the functional mode of P70_IRQ pin.

fields.name: P7CFGB_1
fields.description: P7CFGB[1]. Reading from P7[0] reads the state of P70_IRQ pin.

fields.name: P7_
fields.description: Out of SPI mode: Writing to P7[2] writes the corresponding value to the P72 pin according to the configuration mode defined by P7CFGA[2] and P7CFGB[2]. Reading from P7[2] reads the state of P72 pin.

Timer 0/1.name: T01CON
Timer 0/1.description: The register is used to control Timer0/1 and report its status.

fields.name: TF1
fields.description: Timer1 overflow. Set to logic 1 by hardware on a Timer1 overflow.

fields.name: TR1
fields.description: Timer1 run control. When set to logic 1, Timer1 is enabled.

fields.name: TF0
fields.description: Timer0 overflow. Set by hardware on a Timer0 overflow. The flag is set to logic 0 by the CPU after 2 machine cycles. The bit IE0_1 of register IE0 (see Table 11 on page 17) has to be set to logic 1 to enable the corresponding CPU interrupt.

fields.name: TR0
fields.description: Timer0 run control. When set to logic 1, Timer0 is enabled.

fields.name: IE1
fields.description: External Interrupt1 event. Set to logic 1 by hardware when an external interrupt is detected on P33_INT1. The bit IE0_0 of register IE0 (see Table 11 on page 17) has to be set to logic 1 to enable the corresponding CPU interrupt.

fields.name: IT1
fields.description: External Interrupt1 control. 1: falling edge, 0: low level on P33_INT1.

fields.name: IE0
fields.description: External Interrupt0 event. Set to logic 1 by hardware when an external interrupt is detected on P32_INT0. The bit IE0_0 of register IE0 (see Table 11 on page 17) has to be set to logic 1 to enable the corresponding CPU interrupt.

fields.name: IT0
fields.description: External Interrupt0 control. 1: falling edge, 0: low level on P32_INT0.

fields.name: RCLK0
fields.description: Timer2 Debug UART Receive Clock selector

fields.name: TCLK0
fields.description: Timer2 Debug UART Transmit Clock selector

Debug UART.name: S0CON
Debug UART.description: Debug UART control and status register

FIFO.name: SFF
FIFO.description: Used to monitor the status of the FIFO. Detects completion of data transfers.

FIFO.name: FITEN
FIFO.description: Enables or disables interrupt requests to the CPU and resets FIFO content

fields.name: START_FRAME

fields.name: ENABLE
fields.description: SPI enable: When set to logic 1, enables the SPI interface assuming that selif[1:0] are set to 01b

fields.name: CPHA
fields.description: Clock PHAse: controls relationship between data and clock on SPI transfers

fields.name: CPOL
fields.description: Clock POLarity: controls polarity of SCK clock

fields.name: IE
fields.description: Interrupt Enable 1: enables TR_FE interrupt from SPIstatus

fields.name: IE0_
fields.description: Global interrupt enable. 1: interrupts enabled, 0: all interrupts disabled

fields.name: IP1_7
fields.description: General Purpose IRQ high priority select

CIU.name: CIU_Mode
CIU.description: Defines general modes for transmitting and receiving

fields.name: MSBFirst
fields.description: Set to logic 1, the CRC co-processor calculates the CRC with MSB first. The bit order in the registers CRCResultMSB and the CIU_CRCResultLSB is reversed.

fields.name: DetectSync
fields.description: If set to logic 1, the CIU waits for the F0h byte before the receiver is activated and F0h byte is added as a Sync-byte for transmission.

fields.name: TXWaitRF
fields.description: Set to logic 1 the transmitter in Reader/Writer or Initiator mode for NFCIP-1 can only be started, if an own RF field is generated.

fields.name: RxWaitRF
fields.description: Set to logic 1, the counter for RxWait starts only, if an external RF field is detected in Target mode for NFCIP-1 or in Card Operating mode.

fields.name: PolSigin
fields.description: PolSigin defines the polarity of the SIGIN pin. Set to logic 1, the polarity of SIGIN pin is active high.

fields.name: ModeDetOff
fields.description: Set to logic 1, the internal Data Mode Detector is switched off.

fields.name: CRCPreset
fields.description: Defines the preset value for the CRC co-processor for the CalCRC command.

quality_issues: Overlapping fields: CRCPreset[1:0] and Symbol[0:0]
Overlapping fields: CRCPreset[1:0] and Symbol[0:0]

fields 'CRCPreset' [1:0] and 'Symbol' [0:0] overlap

CIU.name: CIU_TxMode
CIU.description: Defines the transmission data rate and framing during transmission

fields.name: TxCRCEn
fields.description: Set to logic 1, this bit enables the CRC generation during data transmission. Note: This bit shall only set to logic 0 at 106 kbit/s.

fields.name: TxSpeed
fields.description:
Defines bit rate while data transmission.

| Value | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| 000 | 106 kbit/s |
| 001 | 212 kbit/s |
| 010 | 424 kbit/s |
| 011 | 848 kbit/s |
| 100 | 1696 kbit/s |
| 101 | 3392 kbit/s |
| 110 - 111 | Reserved |

fields.name: InvMod
fields.description: Set to logic 1, the modulation for transmitting data is inverted.

fields.name: TxMix
fields.description: Set to logic 1, the signal at SIGIN is mixed with the internal coder. See Section 8.6.12 'Serial data switch' on page 121.

fields.name: TxFraming
fields.description:
Defines the framing used for data transmission.

| Value | Description |
|------|-------------|
| 00 | ISO/IEC 14443A/MIFARE and Passive Communication mode 106 kbit/s |
| 01 | Active Communication mode |
| 10 | FeliCa and Passive Communication mode at 212 kbit/s and 424 kbit/s |
| 11 | ISO/IEC 14443B |

quality_issues: Address outlier: 0x6302 is far from other registers (gap=0x6006, threshold=0x100)

CIU.name: CIU_RxMode
CIU.description: Defines the reception data rate and framing during receiving

fields.name: RXCRCEn
fields.description: Set to logic 1, this bit enables the CRC calculation during reception. The CRC bytes will not be written within the CIU FIFO. Note: This bit shall only set to logic 0 at 106 kbit/s.

fields.name: RxSpeed
fields.description: Defines the bit rate while data receiving. The analog part of the CIU handles only transfer speeds up to 424 kbit/s internally, the digital part of the CIU handles the higher transfer speeds as well. 000: 106 kbit/s, 001: 212 kbit/s, 010: 424 kbit/s, 011: 848 kbit/s, 100: 1696 kbit/s, 101: 3392 kbit/s, 110-111: Reserved.

fields.name: RxNoErr
fields.description: If set to logic 1, a not valid received data stream (less than 4 bits received) will be ignored. The receiver will remain active. Set to logic 0, the receiver is deactivated after receiving a data frame.

fields.name: RxMultiple
fields.description: Set to logic 1, it is possible to receive more than one data frame. This bit is only valid for 212 and 424 kbit/s to handle the Polling command. Having set this bit, the receive and transceive commands will not end automatically. In this case the multiple receiving can only be deactivated by writing the Idle command to the CIU_Command register or clearing this bit by the 80C51.

fields.name: RxFraming
fields.description: Defines the expected framing for data reception. 00: ISO/IEC 14443A/MIFARE and Passive Communication mode 106 kbit/s, 01: Active communication mode, 10: FeliCa and Passive Communication mode at 212 kbit/s and 424 kbit/s, 11: ISO/IEC 14443B.

quality_issues: Address outlier: 0x6303 is far from other registers (gap=0x6006, threshold=0x100)

CIU.name: CIU_TxControl
CIU.description: Controls the logical behavior of the antenna driver pins TX1 and TX2

fields.name: InvTx2RFon
fields.description: Set to logic1 and Tx2RFEn set to logic 1, TX2 output signal is inverted.

fields.name: InvTx1RFon
fields.description: Set to logic1 and Tx1RFEn set to logic 1, TX1 output signal is inverted.

fields.name: InvTx2RFoff
fields.description: Set to logic1 and Tx2RFEn set to logic 0, TX2 output signal is inverted.

fields.name: InvTx1RFoff
fields.description: Set to logic1 and Tx1RFEn set to logic 0, TX1 output signal is inverted.

fields.name: Tx2CW
fields.description: Set to logic 1, the output signal on pin TX2 will deliver continuously the un-modulated 13.56 MHz energy carrier.

fields.name: CheckRF
fields.description: Set to logic 1, Tx2RFEn and Tx1RFEn can not be set if an external RF field is detected.

fields.name: Tx2RFEn
fields.description: Set to logic 1, the output signal on pin TX2 will deliver the 13.56 MHz energy carrier modulated by the transmission data.

fields.name: Tx1RFEn
fields.description: Set to logic 1, the output signal on pin TX1 will deliver the 13.56 MHz energy carrier modulated by the transmission data.

quality_issues: Address outlier: 0x6304 is far from other registers (gap=0x6006, threshold=0x100)

CIU.name: CIU_TxAuto
CIU.description: Controls the setting of the antenna driver

fields.name: AutoRFOff
fields.description: Set to logic 1, own RF field is switched off after the last data bit has been transmitted as defined in the NFCIP-1 standard.

fields.name: Force100ASK
fields.description: Set to logic 1, Force100ASK forces a 100% ASK modulation independent of the setting in CIU_ModGsP register.

fields.name: AutoWakeUp
fields.description: Set to logic 1, the PN532 in CIU Power-down mode can be woken up by the RF level detector.

fields.name: CAOn
fields.description: Set to logic 1, the collision avoidance is activated and internally the value n is set in accordance to the ISO/IEC 18092 / ECMA340 NFCIP-1 standards.

fields.name: InitialRFOn
fields.description: Set to logic 1, the initial RF collision avoidance is performed and the bit InitialRFOn is set to logic 0 automatically, if the RF is switched ON.

fields.name: Tx2RFAutoEn
fields.description: Set to logic 1, RF is switched on at TX2 (i.e. Tx2RFEn is set to logic 1) after the external RF field is switched off according to the time TADT.

fields.name: Tx1RFAutoEn
fields.description: Set to logic 1, RF is switched on at TX1(i.e. Tx1RFEn is set to logic 1) after the external RF field is switched off according to the time TADT.

quality_issues: Address outlier: 0x6305 is far from other registers (gap=0x6006, threshold=0x100)

11 | Test signal defined by LoadModtest in register CIU_TestSel1

fields.name: DriverSel
fields.description:
Selects the signals to be output on Tx1 and Tx2.

00 | Tristate
01 | ...

fields.name: SigOutSel
fields.description: Selects the signals to be output on Tx1 and Tx2.

fields.name: NO_TX_SOF

fields.name: Command
fields.description: Activates a command according the Command Code. Reading this register shows, which command is actually executed. See Section 8.6.20 'CIU command set' on page 133

CIU.name: CIU_CommIEn
CIU.description: CIU communication interrupt enable register

CIU.name: CIU_DivIEn
CIU.description: Controls bits to enable and disable the passing of interrupt requests.

fields.name: SiginAct_IEn
fields.description: Allows the SIGIN active interrupt request to be propagated to CIU_IRQ_0.

fields.name: ModeIEn
fields.description: When set to logic 1, allows the mode interrupt request (indicated by bit ModeIRq) to be propagated to CIU_IRQ_0.

fields.name: CRCIEn
fields.description: When set to logic 1, allows the CRC interrupt request (indicated by bit CRCIRq) to be propagated to CIU_IRQ_0.

fields.name: RfOnIEn
fields.description: When set to logic 1, allows the RF field on interrupt request (indicated by bit RfOnIRq) to be propagated to CIU_IRQ_0.

fields.name: RfOffIEn
fields.description: When set to logic 1, allows the RF field off interrupt request (indicated by bit RfOffIRq) to be propagated to CIU_IRQ_0.

CIU.name: CIU_CommIrq
CIU.description: Contains common CIU interrupt request flags.

fields.name: SET1
fields.description: When set to logic 0 during write operation, the bit set to logic 1 in the write command are written to logic 0 in the register. When set to logic 1 during write operation, the bit set to logic 1 in the write command are written to logic 1 in the register.

fields.name: TX_IRQ
fields.description: Set to logic 1, immediately after the last bit of the transmitted data was sent out.

fields.name: RX_IRQ
fields.description: Set to logic 1 when the receiver detects the end of a valid datastream.

fields.name: IDLE_IRQ
fields.description: Set to logic 1, when a command terminates by itself e.g. when the CIU_Command register changes its value from any command to the Idle command.

fields.name: HI_ALERT_IRQ
fields.description: Set to logic 1, when HiAlert bit in CIU_Status1 register is set to logic 1.

fields.name: LO_ALERT_IRQ
fields.description: Set to logic 1, when LoAlert bit in CIU_Status1 register is set.

fields.name: ERR_IRQ
fields.description: Set to logic 1, if any error flag in the CIU_Error register is set.

fields.name: TIMER_IRQ
fields.description: Set to logic 1, when the timer decrements the TimerValue register to zero.

CIU.name: CIU_DivIrq
CIU.description: Contains miscellaneous interrupt request flags. These bits are latched.

fields.name: SET2
fields.description: When set to logic level 0 during write operation, the bit set to logic 1 in the write command are written to logic 0 in the register.

fields.name: SIGIN_ACT_IRQ
fields.description: Set to logic 1, when SIGIN is active.

fields.name: MODE_IRQ
fields.description: Set to logic level 1, when the mode has been detected by the Data Mode Detector.

fields.name: CRC_IRQ
fields.description: Set to logic level 1, when the CRC command is active and all data are processed.

fields.name: RF_ON_IRQ
fields.description: Set to logic level 1, when an external RF field is detected.

fields.name: RF_OFF_IRQ
fields.description: Set to logic level 1, when an present external RF field is switched off.

CIU.name: CIU_Error
CIU.description: Error flags showing the error status of the last command executed.

fields.name: WR_ERR
fields.description: Set to logic 1, when data is written into the FIFO by the 80C51 during the AutoColl command or MFAuthent command.

fields.name: TEMP_ERR
fields.description: Set to logic 1, if the internal temperature sensor detects overheating.

fields.name: RF_ERR
fields.description: Set to logic 1, if in active communication mode the counterpart does not switch on the RF field in time.

fields.name: BUFFER_OVFL
fields.description: Set to logic 1, if the 80C51 or if the internal state machine tries to write data into the FIFO buffer although the FIFO buffer is already full.

fields.name: COLL_ERR
fields.description: Set to logic 1, if a bit-collision is detected.

fields.name: CRC_ERR
fields.description: Set to logic 1, if RxCRCEn in CIU_RxMode register is set to logic 1 and the CRC calculation fails.

fields.name: PARITY_ERR
fields.description: Set to logic 1, if the parity check has failed.

fields.name: PROTOCOL_ERR
fields.description: Set to logic 1, if one out of the following cases occurs: SOF is incorrect, byte length violation, etc.

CIU.name: CIU_Status1
CIU.description: Contains status flags of the CRC, Interrupt Request System and FIFO buffer.

fields.name: CIU_IRQ_1
fields.description: This bit shows, if any CIU_IRQ_1 source requests attention.

CIU.name: CIU_Status2
CIU.description: Status flags of receiver, transmitter and Data Mode Detector

fields.name: RFFreqOK
fields.description: RX pin frequency in 12-15 MHz range

fields.name: TgActivated
fields.description: Select command received or polling answered

CIU.name: CIU_FIFOData
CIU.description: CIU FIFO data register

CIU.name: CIU_FIFOLevel
CIU.description: FIFO buffer level and flush control register.

fields.name: FLUSHBUFFER
fields.description: Flush FIFO buffer pointers. Sets FIFOLevel[6:0] to 0 and BufferOvfl to 0.

fields.name: FIFIOLEVEL
fields.description: Number of bytes stored in FIFO buffer.

CIU.name: CIU_FIFOLLEVEL
CIU.description: Indicates number of bytes stored in FIFO

fields.name: FlushBuffer
fields.description: Clears FIFO read/write pointers and BufferOvfl

fields.name: FIFOLevel
fields.description: Number of bytes stored in FIFO buffer

CIU.name: CIU_WaterLevel
CIU.description: Defines thresholds for FIFO under- and overflow warning

CIU.name: CIU_Control
CIU.description: Contains miscellaneous control bits.

CIU.name: CIU_BitFraming
CIU.description: Adjustments for bit oriented frames

fields.name: RxAlign
fields.description: Bit position for first received bit in FIFO

fields.name: TxLastBits
fields.description: Number of bits of last byte to transmit

CIU.name: CIU_Coll
CIU.description: CIU collision register

I2C.name: I2C_WU_CONTROL

fields.name: I2C_WU_EN_WR
fields.description: When set to logic 1, the wake-up is valid for write commands

fields.name: I2C_WU_EN_RD
fields.description: When set to logic 1, the wake-up is valid for read commands

fields.name: I2C_WU_EN
fields.description: When set to logic 1, enable the I^2C wake-up conditions

I2C.name: I2CCON

fields.name: CR_2
fields.description: Serial clock frequency selection in Master mode. Together with CR[1:0], this bit determines the clock rate

fields.name: ENS1
fields.description: Serial IO enable. When ENS1 bit is to logic 0, SDA and P50_SCL are in high impedance

fields.name: STA
fields.description: START control. When the STA bit is set to logic 1 to enter Master mode

fields.name: CR_1_0
fields.description: Serial clock frequency selection in Master mode. Together with CR[2], these bits determine the clock rate

quality_issues: address 0xD8 not found in register summary table

I2C.name: I2CSTA
I2C.description: I^2C status register, read-only, contains status codes for I^2C interface states

fields.name: ST
fields.description: Encoded status bits for different I^2C functional modes and states

quality_issues: address 0xD9 not found in register summary table

I2C.name: I2C_DAT

fields.name: I2C_DAT
fields.description: I2C data. Eight bits to be transmitted or just received.

quality_issues: address 0xDA not found in register summary table

I2C.name: I2C_ADR

fields.name: SA
fields.description: Slave address. These bits correspond to the 7-bit Slave address which will be recognized on the incoming data stream from the I^2 C bus.

fields.name: GC
fields.description: General call. When set to logic 1, will cause the I^2 C logic to watch for the general call address to be transmitted on the I^2 C bus.

quality_issues: address 0xDB not found in register summary table

PCR.name: CONFIG_I0_I1
PCR.description: Config I0_I1 register used to select the host interface

fields.name: int1_pol
fields.description: When set to logic 1, the value of the P33_INT1 pin is inverted.

fields.name: pad_I1
fields.description: When read this bit gives the state of the I1 pin.

fields.name: pad_I0
fields.description: When read this bit gives the state of the I0 pin.

fields.name: enselif
fields.description: When set to logic 1, this bit indicates that the selif bits are valid and that the selected interface on the MIF can drive the pins.

fields.name: SELIF
fields.description: These bits are used by the firmware to select the host interface communication link

PCR.name: GPIRQ

fields.name: GPIRQ_ENABLE_P50
fields.description: When set to logic 1, enables pad P50_SCL to generate a GPIRQ interrupt event.

PCR.name: Control
PCR.description: Control register used to perform a firmware reset and clear wake-up conditions

fields.name: CLEAR_WAKEUP_COND
fields.description: Clears value of wakeupcond in Status register. Bit is set to logic 0 automatically by hardware.

fields.name: SOFT_RESET
fields.description: Initiates a firmware reset. Bit is set to logic 0 automatically by hardware after performing firmware reset sequence.

PCR.name: Status
PCR.description: PCR Status register stores the state of the 8 wake-up events

fields.name: I2C_WU
fields.description: I2C wake-up event (on its own address)

FIT.name: FIT
FIT.description: The FIT register contains 6 read-write bits which are logically OR-ed to generate an interrupt going to the CPU.

Power and Clock.name: CONTROL_SWITCH_RNG
Power and Clock.description: Control SVDD switch and random generator

fields.name: HIDE_SVDD_SIG
fields.description: Configures internal state of input signals SIGIN and P34 when idle

fields.name: SIC_SWITCH_OVERLOAD
fields.description: Indicates state of SVDD switch current limiter

fields.name: SIC_SWITCH_EN
fields.description: Enables or disables power to SVDD switch

fields.name: CPU_NEED_RNG
fields.description: Forces random number generator into running mode

Power and Clock.name: LDO

fields.name: OVERCURRENT_STATUS
fields.description: Set to logic 1 by PN532 when overcurrent is detected

fields.name: SEL_OVERCURRENT
fields.description: Select overcurrent threshold. 00: 300 mA 01: 210 mA 10: 180 mA 11: 150 mA

fields.name: ENOFFSET
fields.description: Enable of the LDO offset. When set to logic 1, offset is present

fields.name: CONTROL_HIGHSPEEDREG
fields.description: Select the control source of the LDO regulation speed

Power and Clock.name: CER
Power and Clock.description: Clock Enable Register used to enable or disable the clock of the HSU

fields.name: HSU_ENABLE
fields.description: Enable HSU clock. When 1, HSU is enabled. When 0, HSU is disabled.

Interrupt and Wakeup.name: ILR
Interrupt and Wakeup.description: Interrupt Level Register used to program the level of the external interrupts

fields.name: PORPULSE_LATCHED
fields.description: Indicates that a reset has been generated. When set to logic 1, indicates that the system has been reset.

fields.name: ENABLE_PDSELIF
fields.description: When set to logic 1, P33_INT1 directly controls state of host interface pins

fields.name: GPIRQ_LEVEL
fields.description: Selects gpirq interrupt level. When set to logic 1, wake-up condition is true when gpirq is high.

fields.name: INT1_LEVEL
fields.description: Selects P33_INT1 interrupt level. When set to logic 1, wake-up condition is true when P33_INT1 is low.

fields.name: INT0_LEVEL
fields.description: Selects P32_INT0 interrupt level. When set to logic 1, wake-up condition is true when P32_INT0 is high.

Interrupt and Wakeup.name: Wakeupen
Interrupt and Wakeup.description: PCR Wakeupen register allows selection of different wake-up events

fields.name: I2C_WU_EN
fields.description: I2C wake-up source enable. When set to logic 1, I2C event can wake up PN532

fields.name: GPIRQ_WU_EN
fields.description: General Purpose IRQ wake-up source enable. When set to logic 1, a GPIRQ event can wake up PN532

fields.name: SPI_ON_EN
fields.description: SPI wake-up source enable. When set to logic 1, a SPI event can wake up PN532

fields.name: HSU_ON_EN
fields.description: HSU wake-up source enable. When set to logic 1, an HSU event can wake up PN532

fields.name: CIU_WU_EN
fields.description: Contactless Interface Unit wake-up source enable. When set to logic 1, a CIU event can wake up PN532

fields.name: INT1_EN
fields.description: P33_INT1 wake-up source enable. When set to logic 1, a P33_INT1 event can wake up PN532

fields.name: INT0_EN
fields.description: P32_INT0 wake-up source enable. When set to logic 1, a P32_INT0 event can wake up PN532
